sowing.method: Dibbling on raised beds or flat land furrows

seed_rate.notes: 3-4 kg/ha seed is sufficient for standard field spacing.

sowing.soil_conditions: Deep sandy riverbeds or well-drained sandy loams with pH 6.0-7.0.

irrigation.notes: Ensure moderate moisture. Overwatering at early stage induces excessive leaf growth.
Water regularly. Dry periods cause hollow-heart or blossom-end rot.
Reduce irrigation significantly 10 days before harvest to build sugars.

fertilizer.method: Soil incorporation in seed beds during land prep
fertilizer.notes: Apply NPK along with compost and neem cake.
Apply nitrogen to support rapid vine spread.

maturity_indicators: Ground spot (where melon rests on soil) turns from white to pale yellow
Tendril at the fruit stem becomes completely dry and withered
Dull thud sound is heard when tapped with knuckles
harvest.harvest_method: Hand cutting of fruit stalk using sharp knives
harvest.notes: Do not pull melon from vine. Store in well-ventilated, shaded sheds.
